summary.en: A collaborative multi-agent branch focused on transparent, human-in-the-loop coordination through shared Matrix rooms.
summary.zh: 一条强调透明协作和人在回路中的多智能体分支，通过共享 Matrix 房间来组织任务协同。

en: HiClaw presents itself as a collaborative multi-agent operating model rather than a solo assistant shell. Its repository description emphasizes transparent task coordination, human oversight, and Matrix-room-based collaboration, which gives it a noticeably more team-oriented posture than single-user desktop branches.

That makes it worth listing as a distinct variant instead of a generic tool. The value is not just another integration or plugin layer, but a different way of structuring OpenClaw-style work around shared rooms, coordination, and human-in-the-loop control.
zh: HiClaw 更像一个协作式多智能体操作模型，而不是单人助手壳层。它的仓库描述强调透明的任务协调、人工监督，以及基于 Matrix 房间的协作方式，这让它和偏单用户桌面路线的分支相比，明显更偏团队协同。
因此它更适合作为一个独立变体收录，而不是普通工具。它的核心价值不是再加一层插件或集成，而是围绕共享房间、协调流程和人在回路中的控制方式，重新组织 OpenClaw 风格的工作流。

en: Repository positioning centers on collaborative multi-agent coordination.
Human-in-the-loop and transparency are part of the main value proposition.
Matrix-room coordination gives it a distinctive team workflow angle.
zh: 仓库定位明确围绕协作式多智能体协调展开。
人在回路中和透明性是它的核心卖点之一。
基于 Matrix 房间的协作方式让它具备明显的团队工作流特征。
